headline: Baker Hughes Argentina NovaLT Deal Highlights Gas And LNG Growth Story
summary: Baker Hughes (NasdaqGS:BKR) has secured a contract to supply gas compression units for a major natural gas pipeline project in Argentina. The award includes the first deployment of the company’s NovaLT gas turbine technology in South America. The project is linked to Argentina’s plans to expand natural gas output and support future LNG export capacity. For investors watching the oilfield services and energy technology space, this contract illustrates how Baker Hughes earns business from...
